source_description: Synthetic — represents a first-launch state: minimal config.toml written by the engine, no sessions directory contents, no cron jobs, no plans, no plugins. No real user state was used as input.

files_sanitized.source_type: synthetic minimal config (no real user data)

scenarios_that_replay_this: T6: boot with empty GENESIS_HOME, assert ready event emits and contains expected capability set
T6: --list-sessions on empty home returns empty list without touching $HOME (hermeticity check)
T6: --version / --help flags exit <500ms with no config loaded (B-2 boot-order proof)
T6: boot with no api_key configured, assert engine emits error event rather than panicking
